---
title: "SWR-GP — Identity Transform"
subtitle: "Experiment exp_swr_gp_none"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
---

## Overview

SWR-GP model with Identity response transform on Big Sur daily streamflow.
Number of kernels K swept over K\in{{1,2,3,4}}, K selected by BIC\_eff on training data.

**Config:** m=20, ν=1.5, maxiter=202, seed=42, Gaussian kernel fixed, train: hydr\_year < 30, test: hydr\_year ≥ 30.

## Per-K Training Selection

| K | BIC\_eff | AIC\_eff | Train NSE | Train RMSE |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 40523.2 | 41090.1 | 0.2722 | 4.0961 |
| 2 | 39336.8 | 39902.1 | 0.6259 | 2.9368 |
| 3 | 39144.1 | 39738.0 | 0.6633 | 2.7862 |
| 4 \* | 39137.9 | 39867.2 | 0.6645 | 2.7809 |

(\* = selected model.)

## Test Performance (Best K=4)

Best model parameters: θ = (6.5145, 3.2960, 1.5000, 0.7081)

| Mode | CRPS | NSE | RMSE | MAE |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| sim | 1.1879 | 0.6170 | 2.6132 | 1.2653 |
| krig | 0.7987 | 0.8783 | 1.4729 | 0.4494 |

## Calibration

![PIT histogram — simulation](plots/pit_hist_sim_test.png){width=45%}
![PIT histogram — kriging](plots/pit_hist_krig_test.png){width=45%}

![QQ plot (RQR) — simulation](plots/qq_rqr_sim_test.png){width=45%}
![QQ plot (RQR) — kriging](plots/qq_rqr_krig_test.png){width=45%}
